title: kyllinga nervosa var. ruwenzoriensis
intro: Kyllinga nervosa var. ruwenzoriensis, also known as Ruwenzori Kyllinga, is a type of grassy plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Kyllinga nervosa var. ruwenzoriensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in wound healing and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant involve infusing its leaves and roots in water to create teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
